import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let content = io.read_to_end()
  let lines = string.split(content, "\n")
  mut last_nonempty: Option<String> = None
  mut i = 0
  while i < lines.len()
    let line = match lines.get(i)
    when Some(l)
      l
    when None
      ""
    end
    let stripped = string.trim(line)
    if not string.is_empty(stripped)
      last_nonempty = Some(line)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  match last_nonempty
  when Some(line)
    println(line)
  when None
    println("(none)")
  end
  Ok(())
end
